title: update-make-targets-and-setup-flow
summary: Switched the Makefile's default two-cluster setup path to JWT/OIDC auth: added a `configure-vso-jwt-auth` target, made `configure-vso-auth` a compatibility alias that depends on it, and updated `setup` to call `scripts/configure-vso-jwt-auth.sh` (not `configure-vso-kubernetes-auth.sh`) before `apply-vso-demo.sh`; added a 14-assertion static validation test suite and live-verified both targets against the real two-cluster lab.
keyLearnings: - - `configure-vso-auth: configure-vso-jwt-auth` uses plain Make prerequisite syntax (no recipe body of its own) — running `make configure-vso-auth` triggers the `configure-vso-jwt-auth` recipe via dependency resolution, which is simpler and avoids recipe duplication vs. `@bash scripts/configure-vso-jwt-auth.sh` copy-pasted into both targets.

- - `scripts/configure-vso-kubernetes-auth.sh` is intentionally left in the repo untouched and still directly runnable, but now has zero Makefile entry points — it's fully decoupled from `make` while remaining available for manual/legacy use. Downstream task 10 must update stale prose in README.md, PODMAN_MIGRATION.md, and presenterm/vso.md that still says "make configure-vso-auth # configures auth/kubernetes-vso" or invokes `scripts/configure-vso-kubernetes-auth.sh` directly in the deck's live code blocks.

- - Static-analysis gotcha: when grepping scripts for "does X call configure-vso-kubernetes-auth.sh", must exclude comment lines (`grep -vE ':[0-9]+:[[:space:]]*#'` on `grep -n` multi-file output) — `scripts/setup-vso-cluster.sh` has multiple explanatory comments referencing the script name for migration-compatibility context, which are not invocations.

- - Live-verified end to end: `make configure-vso-jwt-auth` and `make configure-vso-auth` both idempotently configure `auth/jwt-vso` in the real kind-vault-lab cluster with `bound_audiences=[vault]`, `bound_subject=system:serviceaccount:vso-demo:vso-demo`, `role_type=jwt`, and no `token_reviewer_jwt` — matching task 04's script behavior exactly.
- - All 14 test suites under `scripts/tests/` (13 pre-existing + the new one) pass after this change.
blockers: none — all acceptance/validation criteria for task 07 met. Task 08 (verify-two-cluster.sh JWT checks) and task 10 (docs/deck prose updates) are the remaining downstream dependents.
